title: Technical Manager, EV Charger Development
description:
Power the future of mobility in Singapore

Empowering Journeys. Building a Greener Tomorrow.

Do you want your engineering work to leave a visible, lasting impact on Singapore?
Are you excited by the challenge of building critical infrastructure that supports the nation’s transition to electric vehicles?

EV-Electric (EVe) Charging Pte Ltd is the organisation behind Singapore’s public EV charging network. Wholly owned and fully backed by the Land Transport Authority (LTA), we are leading the nationwide deployment of EV chargers and the electrical infrastructure upgrades that make cleaner transportation possible.

As demand for EVs accelerates, we’re looking for passionate, detail-driven engineers to join us and help shape the future of sustainable mobility.

About the Role

As Technical Manager, Charger Development, you will play a key role in the design, deployment, and commissioning of EV chargers across public car parks island-wide. You will work closely with internal teams, contractors, and government agencies to ensure projects are delivered safely, efficiently, and to the highest standards.

This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys seeing projects move from concept to reality—and knowing their work benefits commuters.

What You’ll Be Doing

EV Charger Development & Deployment

  • Support end-to-end design development and deployment of EV chargers in public car parks

  • Monitor site progress to ensure works are delivered on schedule and to specification

  • Support electrical and civil-related site matters during infrastructure upgrades

Tender & Contract Management

  • Develop tender specifications, technical requirements, and supporting documentation

  • Ensure deployment works comply with contract requirements, relevant codes of practice, and regulatory standards

Testing, Commissioning & Compliance

  • Manage and support testing and commissioning of EV Charging Points (EVCPs)

  • Coordinate with relevant agencies on approvals and inspections

  • Ensure all testing, commissioning, and handover documentation is properly completed and maintained

Team & Project Support

  • Support operational and administrative functions within the team

  • Lead or support ad-hoc projects and continuous improvement initiatives

What you are expected to demonstrate in this Role

  • Business Awareness & Execution – Understand industry trends, align work with organizational goals, and suggest practical improvements

  • Innovation & Problem Solving – Propose creative ideas, test new approaches, and refine solutions

  • Evidence-Based Decision Making – Analyze data, identify patterns, and make sound technical recommendations

  • Collaboration & Teamwork – Work respectfully with colleagues, share knowledge, and contribute to team success

  • Stakeholder Engagement – Communicate effectively with contractors, agencies, and partners to build trust and alignment

  • Adaptability & Growth Mindset – Embrace change, learn from challenges, and continuously develop your skills

What We’re Looking For

Qualifications & Experience

  • Tertiary qualification in an Engineering discipline

  • At least 2 years of relevant working experience in engineering, project management, or site supervision

    • Candidates with less experience will also be considered if they demonstrate strong organisational skills, teamwork, and leadership potential

Skills & Attributes

  • Experience in project coordination, site supervision, and administrative support

  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills to work with diverse stakeholders

  • High attention to detail and strong documentation discipline

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications

  • A proactive, responsible, and solutions-oriented mindset

Why Join EVe?

  • Work on nation-critical infrastructure with visible impact across Singapore

  • Be part of the EV transformation journey in a fast-growing sector

  • Enjoy the stability and purpose of an LTA-backed organisation

  • Collaborate with passionate professionals committed to sustainability and innovation

If you’re ready to apply your engineering skills to something that truly matters, we’d love to hear from you.
Join us and help power Singapore’s electric future. ⚡🚗

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Journeys.    


Are you passionate about shaping the future of transportation? Do you want to be at the forefront of the electric vehicle (EV) revolution in Singapore? Look no further! 


We are the people behind Singapore’s public EV charging infrastructure, fully owned and financially backed by Land Transport Authority (LTA). We are fully dedicated to build a sustainable future by expanding the infrastructure for electric vehicles. As the demand for clean energy transportation continues to soar, we're seeking talented individuals to join our team to accelerate the transition to a greener transportation system.
